title: 7 Best Mailchimp Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Explore the best Mailchimp alternatives. Compare free and paid email marketing tools for small business, creators, and enterprises.
intro: While Mailchimp remains popular, many users seek alternatives due to pricing changes, limited automation features, or better platform-specific solutions. Whether you're a creator, e-commerce brand, or small business, several competitors offer superior features, better customer support, and more transparent pricing.
why_switch: Mailchimp's free tier limitations and recent pricing increases make alternatives more cost-effective
Specialized platforms offer better features for specific use cases like e-commerce, newsletters, or course creation
Many alternatives have significantly higher customer satisfaction ratings and better support

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers the best value for money with a free tier supporting up to 1,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at just $9/month—significantly cheaper than Mailchimp. It includes all essential features like drag-drop editing, automation, and landing pages without the limitations of Mailchimp's free plan.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators with built-in monetization, ad networks, and referral programs that Mailchimp lacks. With a free tier supporting 2,500 subscribers and outstanding 4.4 Trustpilot rating, it's ideal for writers looking to grow and monetize their audience.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit specializes in creator economics with native support for digital products, commerce integrations, and visual automations tailored for online businesses. Its subscriber tagging and sequences are more intuitive than Mailchimp's, making it ideal for course creators and content entrepreneurs.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing with a fully-featured CRM, advanced automation, and lead scoring—offering enterprise-grade capabilities that Mailchimp can't match. It's the better choice for sales-focused businesses requiring sophisticated customer lifecycle management.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo's free tier supports up to 100,000 contacts (versus Mailchimp's 500), making it unbeatable for growing businesses on a budget. It also includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat channels in a single platform, providing comprehensive omnichannel marketing that Mailchimp doesn't offer.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo is the gold standard for e-commerce email marketing with deep Shopify/WooCommerce integration, predictive analytics, and automated flows designed specifically for online stores. If you sell products online, Klaviyo's capabilities far exceed what Mailchimp offers.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely combines email marketing with webinar hosting, online courses, and conversion funnels—making it the all-in-one platform for educational content creators that Mailchimp can't support. Its automation capabilities and course delivery features are purpose-built for the online education space.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with support for up to 100,000 contacts, compared to Mailchimp's 500-contact limit. For newsletter-focused creators, Beehiiv provides 2,500 free subscribers with built-in monetization features. Both platforms offer essential marketing tools without requiring an immediate upgrade.

faq.q: What is the best Mailchimp alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the best overall alternative for small businesses, combining affordability (starting at $9/month), a generous free tier (1,000 subscribers), and all the essential features small businesses need. If you're looking for a more advanced solution, Brevo offers excellent value with its massive free contact limit and multi-channel capabilities.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite starts at just $9/month (cheaper than Mailchimp's $13) and offers a free plan with 1,000 subscribers. Brevo also provides a free tier with unlimited contacts, making it completely free for businesses under 100,000 contacts. Both options provide better value than Mailchimp's pricing structure.
